name: Incense burner
description: Central column of accent capped with campfire — a censer/brazier.
python_skill_signature: pipeline.skills.incense_burner.build(aabb: AABB, materials: Materials, style: str, **kwargs) -> list[Op]
style_affinity: East-Asian (Japanese/Chinese) motif. Coherent in japanese/chinese (and fantasy). Out of place in Western, Gothic, Renaissance, Modern, Mediterranean buildings — use only if the building is East-Asian.
